title: Korte's Pack
description: These are some of the mods I use to play Minecraft... You can find a really big variety of mods that will just pump up your experience withou losing much performance and keeping the vanilla feelling to it
body:
![Rounded rectangle with a red and yellow gradient and "Korte's Pack" written on.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c4e21688bb76ab01a09a47e832d575b66e75485.png)
# Content
> Here you can find all types of mods, such as bug fix mods, optimization mods and mods that add loads and loads of new content such as mobs, biomes, enchantments, armor, tools, structures and the list goes on and on...

# Why?
> Well, this is the modpack I use personally to play minecraft and thought other people might find it fun to play with it too. I'm not aiming for big number or any especific theme, just fun and happines, hope you like it!!

# Suggestions
> If you want me to add, remove, update any mod or change the modpack in anyway, feel free to ask for it on my social media pages =)
